news.title: LTIMindtree CEO Venu Lambu discusses AI's impact on the IT services sector.
news.summary: LTIMindtree CEO Venu Lambu discusses AI's impact on the IT services sector.

news.title:
Mid-tier IT firms like Coforge, LTIMindtree, and Zensar secure AI-led large contracts, highlighting rising demand for digital transformation.
Deals include Zensar's $210M financial services contract and LTIMindtree's $100M European medical tech project, emphasizing AI-driven innovation.
news.summary:
Mid-tier IT firms like Coforge, LTIMindtree, and Zensar secure AI-led large contracts, highlighting rising demand for digital transformation.
Deals include Zensar's $210M financial services contract and LTIMindtree's $100M European medical tech project, emphasizing AI-driven innovation.

news.title:
LTIMindtree partners with NVIDIA to enhance India's tax analytics under Insight 2.0.
Collaboration uses NVIDIA AI and cloud tech to improve tax analytics efficiency.
news.summary:
LTIMindtree partners with NVIDIA to enhance India's tax analytics under Insight 2.0.

news.title:
LTIMindtree signs $100M multi-year deal with MedTech, boosting digital innovation.
Q3 FY25 net profit fell 30.7% to Rs 970.6 cr; revenue rose 3.7% to Rs 10,781 cr.
news.summary:
LTIMindtree signs $100M multi-year deal with MedTech, boosting digital innovation.
Q3 FY25 net profit fell 30.7% to Rs 970.6 cr; revenue rose 3.7% to Rs 10,781 cr.

news.title:
LTIMindtree signed a $100M multiyear deal with a European MedTech firm.
The 7-year agreement focuses on product development and hearing solutions support.
news.summary:
LTIMindtree signed a $100M multiyear deal with a European MedTech firm.
The 7-year agreement focuses on product development and hearing solutions support.

news.title:
Jefferies downgrades LTIM rating to Underperform, cuts target price to Rs 4300.
Previous target price for LTIM was Rs 6175, now significantly reduced.
news.summary:
Jefferies downgrades LTIM rating to Underperform, cuts target price to Rs 4300.
Previous target price for LTIM was Rs 6175, now significantly reduced.

news.title:
Jefferies downgraded Infosys, HCLTech, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, TCS, and Hexaware on AI concerns, cutting price targets up to 33%.
Despite YTD declines up to 16%, Jefferies sees more downside. Coforge, Sagility, and IKS Health are its top picks.
news.summary:
Jefferies downgraded Infosys, HCLTech, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, TCS, and Hexaware on AI concerns, cutting price targets up to 33%.
Despite YTD declines up to 16%, Jefferies sees more downside. Coforge, Sagility, and IKS Health are its top picks.

news.title:
FIIs reduced stakes in Indian IT firms like Infosys and TCS amid AI concerns.
Investor sentiment shift reflects pressure on the IT sector over the past year.
news.summary:
FIIs reduced stakes in Indian IT firms like Infosys and TCS amid AI concerns.
Investor sentiment shift reflects pressure on the IT sector over the past year.

news.title:
Indian equity markets fell sharply, ending a three-session gain streak due to US-Iran tensions.
Tata Investment, Newgen, and other key stocks showed significant movement amid broad-based sell-off.
news.summary:
Indian equity markets fell sharply, ending a three-session gain streak due to US-Iran tensions.
Tata Investment, Newgen, and other key stocks showed significant movement amid broad-based sell-off.

news.title:
LTIMindtree rebrands as LTM Limited, focusing on 'business creativity' in AI-centric services.
Q3FY26 revenue was ₹10,781 crore; net profit fell 12% YoY to ₹959 crore, with 16.1% margins.
news.summary:
LTIMindtree rebrands as LTM Limited, focusing on 'business creativity' in AI-centric services.
Q3FY26 revenue was ₹10,781 crore; net profit fell 12% YoY to ₹959 crore, with 16.1% margins.

news.title:
Wipro, LTIMindtree, and other IT stocks dropped as Nifty IT fell 6% after Anthropic's AI tool launch.
LTIMindtree, Persistent Systems fell over 6%, while HCLTech, Infosys, Wipro declined over 5% amid global tech selloff.
news.summary:
Wipro, LTIMindtree, and other IT stocks dropped as Nifty IT fell 6% after Anthropic's AI tool launch.
LTIMindtree, Persistent Systems fell over 6%, while HCLTech, Infosys, Wipro declined over 5% amid global tech selloff.

news.title:
L&T's IT units, LTIMindtree and LTTS, are set to miss their growth targets for 2026 due to economic uncertainties, leadership churn, and a slow merger process.
While L&T's overall revenue may exceed targets, its IT divisions lag behind peers like KPIT and Tata Elxsi, with slower growth in key sectors like automotive.
news.summary:
L&T's IT units, LTIMindtree and LTTS, are set to miss their growth targets for 2026 due to economic uncertainties, leadership churn, and a slow merger process.
While L&T's overall revenue may exceed targets, its IT divisions lag behind peers like KPIT and Tata Elxsi, with slower growth in key sectors like automotive.

news.title:
Zensar faces revenue decline as Cisco, one of its top clients, reduces IT vendor partnerships and discretionary spending.
Peers like Hexaware, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, and Sonata also face client pressures, highlighting risks for mid-tier IT firms.
news.summary:
Zensar faces revenue decline as Cisco, one of its top clients, reduces IT vendor partnerships and discretionary spending.
Peers like Hexaware, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, and Sonata also face client pressures, highlighting risks for mid-tier IT firms.

news.title:
LTIMindtree's CFO anticipates higher EBIT margins for FY26 despite fewer Q4 working days.
Fit4Future improved margins by 230 bps in 9 months; evolving into New Horizons for growth, cost control.

news.title:
LTIMindtree expects sustained growth driven by execution, deal activity, and AI solutions.
CEO Venu Lamba targets nearly double-digit YoY growth in Q4 FY26.

news.title:
Q3 results show underwhelming performance; IT firms like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and others set aside Rs 5,500 crore for Labour Codes compliance.
Reliance Industries, ICICI Bank, and HDFC Bank report lower-than-expected earnings; luxury hotels and premium brands show strong growth trends.
news.summary:

news.title:
LTIMindtree, Tata Capital, Adani Power, CEAT, Oberoi Realty, and Sai Silks report mixed Q3 FY26 results.
Adani Power wins NCLAT approval for ₹4,000 cr Vidarbha plan; CEAT posts 60.3% net profit rise YoY.
